feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Not able to switch to custom Theme in Fiori launchpad
entry.content: We are facing an issue where the custom logo maintained for the Fiori Launchpad is not reflecting on the UI. Despite configuring the custom logo through the standard theming process, the system continues to display the default SAP logo.

entry.title: Deactive / sell / scrap assets in company codes closed for a long time
entry.content:
We want to delete all assets belong to companies had been sold/closed for a long time. Posting period are all closed for these companies. We tried tcodes ABAVN ABAON F-92 to remove these assets but they tried to create posting and all require company period open. Asset cannot be deleted once transaction exists either. Is there a way to scrap or delete them without any new posting? We just want to delete them from database so to clear FI_DOCUMNT errors and compress ACDOCA.

I also archived some assets. Even DELETION step is run, assets still in ANLA table. How do we delete these assets without creating any posting?

Thanks, Colin

entry.title: Kitting workflow to support CTO process
entry.content:
The CTO process used in my warehouse has a manual kitting and packaging operation, where the external manufacturing application generates a kit list. The operator looks up the inventory and sends an email to the storage locations to transfer materials to the packaging location. The parts are packed and returned to the location that initiated the request.  I am trying to find a way to implement a system driven process to manage this. I have three constraints that must be adhered to:
CTO process cannot be impacted. Solution must be additive only
Need to govern material flow referencing the order to maintain clarity of process. 
The packing team uses packing instructions in the current outbound parts shipping. The same operation needs to be followed to take advantage of efficiency and packing integrity.
I have reviewed use of Delivery documents without reference, STO between storage locations, sales orders with reservations, production orders.  All options seem to leave a critical gap. If anyone has attempted this with any success using best practices, could you share your approach?

We are using S/4 HANA with stockroom (LE-WM).

I do not want to deploy a partial solution. Any suggestions would be appreciated.

entry.title: How do the Idoc has to be built for the sales rebate coming from scope 1B6 condition contract?
entry.content:
Dear all

After long research on this topic ( sap documentation, books, best practices, note). I found several pieces of answers but all of them seems old and they don't clearly go in the same way. 

How do the Idoc has to be built for the sales rebate coming from the scope item 1B6 condition contract? Do we have to built under NACE with a standard RSNASTED under WR application? What is the program used ? What Idoc to be used ? INVOIC02? Is there a sap roadmap to cover this topic?

Thank you

Ingrid

entry.title: Unable to find SAP S/4HANA System Administration Certification
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am looking for the certification "SAP Certified Technology Consultant - SAP S/4HANA System Administration", but I am unable to find it in the official SAP certification list or training portal.

Could anyone please clarify:

  • Whether this certification is still available or has been renamed?

  • If it has been replaced, what is the current equivalent certification for SAP Basis / S/4HANA System Administration?

    Any guidance or official reference links would be very helpful.

    Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Committed date is past in sto in s4 hana
entry.content:
Committed date is in past for the sto 4902024735 .

we would like to know what changes are required to ensure commit date always is not in past

In ecc 

4916985649- we have commit date Always as today or future date depending on the availability of material.

we would like to have same behavior in s4 hana

entry.title: Flex hours not reading and populating as zero while configuring works schedule
entry.content:
Hi,

Can some help me to resolve this i've configured New work schedule with flex hours with no overtime. 
The tables used are V_T550p, V_T550A,  V_t551A, V_T508A, V_T551C and generated work schedule.

Still i'm facing attched error.

entry.title: Error in Chart of Dep
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

We have created the Chart of Depreciation: 1000 when we are trying to assign COD to company code :1000.

we are getting below issues:

Error -1: “Parallel crcy area (crcy type 30) missing for area 01 ch. of deprec. 1000”

Error -2: “Ledger NL defined in CoCd 1000 is not active in chart of depreciation 1000”

kindly provide the solution and let us know what the root cause of the issues is.

Please find my attachment.

Regards,

entry.title: Unable to generate a customer account statement in a PDF Form
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Greetings of the day!!!

As per SAP suggestion, we are using the report "RFKORD10" to send the customer account statements seperately for the Zero Balance Accounts and the Detailed Accont Statement.
However, when we send the statement, it is sending the statement in an SAP Script Format. Request you to kindly suggest if there is any way to send the statement in a PDF Form which we are currently using it from "T Code F.27"

Please refer to the earlier SAP Case "1394356/2025".

Thanks & Regards,
Sainath Manchala

entry.title: Vendor Details for RE document
entry.content:
Hi Team,

we had fetched FAGLL03H and FBL3N report for some GL and basis on which checking vendor details for those documents.

we had found that for RE document type vendor details is not coming in FAGLL03H and FBL3N both. 

attachment is there for reference for QA server.

Thanks

Monika 

9717721884

entry.title: Fiori - F2901 tile returns 404 error for Component.js
entry.content: Fiori - F2901 tile is not loading, it's returning 404 not found for Component.js file

entry.title: Error message SIPT805 - " Total value is higher than in original invoice"
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

I am experiencing a problem when creating a credit note linked to an invoice in SAP SD.

When I try to save/post the document, the system displays an alert stating that the credit note amount exceeds the original invoice amount, and when I save it, no accounting document is generated and the credit note does not appear in VBRK or SIPT_VBRK.

However, upon checking in detail, the amounts appear to be exactly the same as those on the invoice.

Has anyone else experienced a similar issue?

Any suggestions on what else I should check would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks!

entry.title: Down Payment adjustment for Partial delivery/Partial invoice
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

The customer is on SAP S/4 HANA On Premise solution- SAP S/4 HANA 2023-FPS 1

We have implemented Scope item BKJ- Sales order processing with Customer Down Payment. Now the requirement is to have the down payment adjusted for Partial invoices created against sales order line item. 

Scenario as below.

Order quantity - 100 EA. Delivery to be split on multiple delivery dates on the sales order.

Price per unit - 50 USD/ EA

Total order value - 5000 USD

Advance received - 500 USD (10% of order value)

Partial delivery/ invoice of 10 EA should adjust this 10% advance at the invoice and show an outstanding of only 450 USD against the total invoice value of 500 USD

Is there any Standard SAP solution for the On premise version 2023? 

I know that we can make use of the combination of Service material and condition type to provide a custom solution for this requirement but as far as possible we would want to avoid that.

Any help or pointers would be apprciated.

Thanks in advance.

Kartik Shah

entry.title: Is there a quick way to fill the amount field with remaining balance in app F1520 AR/AP Items tab?
entry.content:
Hi,

Find from note 3421357 - F1069 - Enable double click to autofill amount

'You would like a quick way to fill the amount field with remaining balance in posting/clearing Fiori apps in tabs 'Post on Account' and 'Post to G/L Account'.  With this note, it will be possible to autofill the amount by double clicking the amount field.'

Is there a solution to enable double click to autofill amount in AR/AP Items tab, like the function in Tcode F-28?

Thanks!

Lena

entry.title: The Orders with Item Level Delivery Block are not reflecting in credit exposure.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are facing an issue where the sales order with Delivery Block at item Level is not reflecting in credit exposure of the customer even though it is credit approved.

We have a requirement from business that when a sales order is credit approved ,no matter the Delivery Block at Item Level ,it should reflect the entire amount of the sales order in credit exposure. Can this functionality be achieved by customizing in standard SAP?

If this can not be achieved by standard customizing , is there any other way this can be implemented? 

Thank You 

Simran

entry.title: only active database instances are loaded into system memory
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Please ensure only active database instances are loaded into system memory,with a view to optimising RAM utilisation and reducing infrastructure cost .

 

Regards,

Amit

entry.title: Issue with release strategy
entry.content: Issue with release strategy after the proper configuration set up

entry.title: How Ghana’s Local Content Enforcement Is Changing SAP S/4HANA Solution Design in Oil & Gas
entry.content:
The gap between what sellers think local content means and how it is implemented in Ghana’s oil and gas sector is widening.

In February 2026, the Petroleum Commission of Ghana reiterated its push toward deeper local-content enforcement.

Under Ghana’s local content framework (L.I. 2204 and subsequent amendments), critical operational scopes are now reserved for Indigenous Ghanaian Companies (IGCs), with stricter expectations around equity participation, partnerships, and reporting.

This is no longer a broad policy decision.
It is enforced through structure and proof.

Higher equity barriers: while 5% equity is the floor for petroleum licenses, providing goods and services via joint venture often requires at least 10% IGC participation.

Strategic alliances are being enforced: foreign firms are increasingly pushed into partnerships to demonstrate real technology transfer, not passive ownership.

The evidence trail matters: reporting expectations in 2026 increasingly require auditable proof of in-country spend and local participation.

For enterprise sellers working on S/4HANA programs in Ghana’s upstream sector, this is starting to show up as a design constraint across the system landscape, not only a compliance checkbox.
 
Across S/4HANA (Finance, Procurement, Projects) and the Oil & Gas industry solution, requirements are becoming more explicit:
• Vendor master data must classify and validate Indigenous Ghanaian Company (IGC) status, ownership, and eligibility for reserved scopes
• Joint venture and partner structures must reflect enforceable equity participation, not just commercial agreements
• Procurement and contract allocation must be traceable to demonstrate compliance with reserved operational scopes
• Project and operational spend must distinguish in-country vs external value with audit-level precision
• Data lineage across procurement, projects and finance must be provable, not reconstructed
 
This is starting to surface early in deal cycles during solution design, data model validation, and compliance workshops not just post-implementation.
 
If you’re running SAP S/4HANA deals in Ghana’s upstream sector, are you accounting for how local content requirements will be modelled, tracked, and defended across your solution design? Has local content started to affect your deal timelines or how your solution is being evaluated?

entry.title: Intercompany Asset Transfer
entry.content:
When transferring assets between Company codes using ABT1N. and selected No Revenue but still asking for Revenue GL's. don't know why?  Can we use IC clearing account between Assets as GL account to clear between 2 company codes.  the message is throwing like this.

Account 21800200 is defined as a balance sheet account in chart of accounts SSMH. However, this is not correct for circumstance Clearing acct.revenue from sale to affiliated comp.

You should note that the Customizing definition of the respective depreciation area also has an influence on the consistency check for the general ledger accounts. This particularly affects depreciation areas that are set up for managing investment support measures on the liabilities side. In order for the consistency check to be correct, you must set the correct indicator in the definition of the affected depreciation area.

entry.title: not able to create custom strategy seq for OVZG
entry.content:
Dear Expert ,

i am not able to create custom strategy seq in OVZG. please share configuration path and tcode for this. for your ref. please check attachment.
